feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: How did they do it?
entry.content: How did they do it?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

Will we ever get back to normal or will the jannies continue ignoring this? Inb4 I get a warning despite making the only actually relevant thread in here and not just spamming these movies...

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: God Of War’ To Recast Lead Kratos After Ryan Hurst Suffers Injury On Set Of Prime Video Series
entry.content: >This is a shocker: Prime Video‘s God Of War will have a new actor playing Kratos as the lead role in the high profile fantasy drama series is being recast, Deadline has learned. >The decision, made after a careful consideration by the studios on the show, Sony Pictures Television and Amazon MGM Studios, comes after Ryan Hurst, who had been originally cast as Kratos, was seriously injured on the set of the PlayStation video game adaptation in late June. https://deadline.com/2026/07/god-of -war-r
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >My name is Max. My world is fire and blood.
entry.content: >My name is Max. My world is fire and blood.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Cronus Frontier will ask a great deal of you in the days and months ahead. We'r…
entry.content: >Cronus Frontier will ask a great deal of you in the days and months ahead. We're not soldiers or killers. We're scientists. Inventors. Explorers. And yet we will do whatever it takes to protect this colony and everything we've built here together. Not all of you are with us. Some of you have chosen to side with our enemies. Driven by fear. Greed. Ambition. I know who you are. And I know what you've done. Don't think you're getting out of this alive. What the fuck was Cantor's problem please tel
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: What was the first F2P MMO you remember playing, anons? For me it was probably G…
entry.content: What was the first F2P MMO you remember playing, anons? For me it was probably GunZ: The Duel or FlyFF. I never got into Maplestory growing up. If we're counting Runescape then it would definitely be Runescape for me. I remember playing that back in 2004. We had a massive MMORPG boom in 2007-2008, so I was playing so many during that year. Scions of Fate and 9Dragons for me. Mabinogi was another one I played on and off for like a year when it first launched.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >rave reviews >glowing audience scores >on track to be a box office smash Where …

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Are people really swayed by a movie's overwhelmingly positive review scores and …
entry.content: Are people really swayed by a movie's overwhelmingly positive review scores and will watch it simply because everyone seems to love it? Is it really that easy to trick people?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

Links: https://kick.com/bingobongo_twins https://x.com/BingoBongoTwins https://x.com/Ashleymetica https://www.youtube.com/@BingoBongo -twins https://www.instagram.com/Ashleymet ica https://www.instagram.com/hahahale https://www.instagram.com/dimditty https://www.ebay
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /int/ International: Hazel eyes aren't just a simple blend of brown and green. They are a complex int…
entry.content: Hazel eyes aren't just a simple blend of brown and green. They are a complex interaction of melanin levels, collagen structures, and light scattering within the iris. Depending on lighting, hazel eyes may look more green, golden, or even greyish. This dynamic quality makes hazel eyes appear different every time you look at them - a living work of art. Only about 5% of the world's population has hazel eyes, making them rarer than blue eyes, but slightly more common than pure green or grey eyes. T
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: Did you know that Romanians use the words "cum" and "precum" in everyday speech?…
entry.content: Did you know that Romanians use the words "cum" and "precum" in everyday speech? "Cum" means "how" in Romanian, and "precum" means "such as."
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.content: Best way to play this in 2026? Playstation version, PC version with quality of life improvements? I've seen that the AI upscale of VII is shit (turns blankets into hedges), what about Moguri mod for IX?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: USB-C port not tight anymore?
entry.content: Here comes the savior. You take this little guy, slide him in between the middle plastic part holding the pins and the long edge of the port, then meticulously slide from one corner to another with dexterity to dislodge the lint or any other foreign matter. Blow and or pick out the debris and repeat until clean. Should be good as new.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Rust is the first AI-native language
entry.content: Why are the reddit luddites resisting this? I think it's long been obvious to everyone that any new project written in Rust is being developed entirely by AI. Rust is an AI-native language, and you should accept that fact. Rust projects don't have to be developed by humans. Even if the author doesn't know what their project does or why it was written, that doesn't make it bad.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Why are there no good game journalists left?

entry.title: /b/ Random: i have schizoaffective disorder, it's hard to live with, i mean really fucking h…
entry.content: i have schizoaffective disorder, it's hard to live with, i mean really fucking hard. the mental part of it isn't that bad, but the emotional conflict is really awful, and has caused me a lot of trouble. i take lots of different drugs, to keep my mind off the way i feel. manic episodes are even worse than that feeling of crippling depression that comes around once in a while.
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >the entire marketing push has been that even a fucking moron can prompt these t…
entry.content: >the entire marketing push has been that even a fucking moron can prompt these things >"You're gonna get left behind luddite!!!" lol, I already know how to write English. >"Noooooooo!!! You have to set up 100 agents and run RAG loops and use all your tokens and use Fable and pay $2000 a month to Dario and Sam for multiple ultimate accounts!!!!!" Pure unadulterated copium. I can choose to prompt a shitty LLM anytime I want, whereas that is the only thing you can do. You have no skills. You won't
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I'm looking for some good mp3 player recomendations. I'm not looking for any ove…
entry.content: I'm looking for some good mp3 player recomendations. I'm not looking for any over the top device that has wifi, or can play videos; for that I'll stick with my phone. The purpose was just to listen to music, and be as minimalistic as possible, while also being able to show the art cover of the album as I personally never liked those basic devices that only shows the name of the song. Picrel is one such player I was looking at, but I heard it sorts your album music alphabetically instead of the t
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Name my band pls
entry.content: Hello 4chan can you come up with the good name for my industrial metal band? We have just created band after we had threesome with the harlot in middle after we met at the Rammstein concert. I think she is lesbian. Not anymore! Lol! We rented the abandoned gay bar from my Holocaust survivor uncle, we plan to use that as recording studio. Sorry for bad English, we are from Germany.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Help me find this fucker, pls.
entry.content: Recently, there has been a ruckus at Malabon National Highschool, as an FB account by the name of "Bella Asx" threatened the entire school of committing a mass school shooting, along with threatening a nearby elementary school of the same thing. Now, there has been action taken by the authorities of Malabon, but I am frustrated with how slow they are. The authority is doing everything but tracking down the owner of this account. Speaking of the anonymous account, the user itself is treating shit
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.content: Hey i kinda came to this conclusion in a thread about this but the more i think about it the more it makes sense. All national sports is propaganda. You have a bunch of charismatic people made to represent your country, fighting for it. Then like if they win its an excuse to suck the dick of your country for something arbitrary and retarded. Theirs personal drama to get you more invested about the game and like wrestling shit about games being a clash of ideals well they mouth feed you propagand

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The random, one-shot combat ruins this game at a fundamental level. I love wasti…
entry.content: The random, one-shot combat ruins this game at a fundamental level. I love wasting 5 turns of production to make a unit that gets killed in one turn. And when you're fighting a stack, you don't even know what unit yours will target. Anyone who prefers this over 1UPT is a retard

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The elder scrolls
entry.content: Why isn’t there an official morrowind remaster/remake/HD release? It’s a great game but so ugly and obtuse, especially compared to its contemporaries at the time even. A lot of it didn’t age well. And I don’t care for modding or unofficial content, that’s just not for me. Why can’t it get the oblivion treatment?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Words with venom, words that bind. Words used like weapons to cloud my mind. I'm…
entry.content: Words with venom, words that bind. Words used like weapons to cloud my mind. I'm a person. I'm a man. But no matter how I try, people just say "Hey! There's that "nigger" guy." Everywhere I go, it's always the same. Everyone just thinks of me as that one single name. "Hey Nigger Guy! Nigger Guy! Hi Nigger Guy!" Stop! Now go. Call me Nigger Guy! Fill me with your hate! Try to bring me down- Oop up, you're too late. When will it end, will there ever be a time? When I can be thought of as more... t
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: I'm a 23 year old male and I've been seeing a 41 year old woman for the past 4 m…
entry.content: I'm a 23 year old male and I've been seeing a 41 year old woman for the past 4 months or so. I met her at a local yoga class dealing with some leg cramp issues I've been having and we hit it off and basically have been in this casual thing for a while. I never had a GF and she took my virginity knowingly. She's a divorcee and has a 5 year old kid, but I haven't had any interaction with ex-husband and I don't interact with kid at all that much, it's been a lot of "My kid's asleep, come over and w
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random
